title: aquilegia hispanica
intro: Aquilegia hispanica, also known as the Spanish columbine, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for wounds and infections. The health benefits of Aquilegia hispanica are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the flowers, leaves, and roots in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
